hero.lede: Eleven rituals for caring for skin and home, handcrafted in our Marbella workshop. Skincare and home soaps of natural origin formulated with the same exacting standards — Andalusian botanical oils, ISO 16128 certified, recyclable packaging.

dualFeatured.personalDesc: 2-in-1 shampoo, body milk and hand & body soap: the complete daily shower. House-made artisan formulation with argan and olive oils.
dualFeatured.hogarDesc: Degreaser 99% natural origin, citrus dishwasher liquid and 97% natural origin multi-surface cleaner. A spotless kitchen inside and out.

lineCosmetica.intro: Our foundational line. Five rituals for body, hair and face — formulated since 2021 under ISO 16128 protocol and dermatologically tested. Botanical material from southern Europe, patient formulation.
lineCosmetica.introEmphasis: Botanical materials from southern Europe, patient formulation.

botanica.body: We don't separate what cares for the skin from what cares for the home. Our essential oils, extracts and plant surfactants are identical in both lines — only the formulation changes. One workshop, one standard.
botanica.imgAlt: Botanical ingredients of natural origin — artisan cosmetics by Natura Esencials

lineHogar.intro: Soaps and cleaners of natural origin for the surfaces we touch every day. With the same exacting standards we apply to skin: no harsh sulphates, no synthetic fragrances, no toxic residues for whoever cooks with you.
lineHogar.introEmphasis: With the same exacting standards we apply to skin

origen.body: We work with carefully selected local and national suppliers. Olive oil, lavender, chamomile, rosemary — southern ingredients that travel just a few kilometres to our workshop. Proximity is also an ingredient.
origen.bodyEmphasis: all just hours from the workshop.

lineMascota.intro: Because those who keep us company also deserve a thoughtful formula. Two specific rituals — one canine, one feline — with calming actives, no harsh soaps, no toxic residues if they lick their coat after bathing.

newsletter.sub: Be first to know about limited editions and receive 10% off your first order.
newsletter.success: Subscribed. Your first letter is on its way.
newsletter.error: Could not subscribe. Please try again.

popup.title: 10% off your first ritual.
popup.body: Join the correspondence and receive a courtesy code with our first seasonal letter.

footer.brandDesc: Artisan skincare and home care, handcrafted in Marbella. Andalusia, Spain.

metadata.homeDescription: Eleven rituals handcrafted in Marbella. Skincare and home cleaners with ISO 16128 certification, Andalusian botanicals and recyclable packaging.
metadata.homeKeywords: artisan skincare, home care, artisan soap, Marbella, Andalusia, ISO 16128, artisan body wash

product.smallBatch: Small batches with human control. Andalusian botanicals, ISO 16128 certification, handcrafted in Andalusia.

cosmetica.title: Artisan
cosmetica.desc: Artisan skincare of natural origin for everyday use: hair, body, face and shaving rituals. Three collections — Basic, For Her and For Him — formulated to ISO 16128 and handcrafted in Andalusia.

hogar.title: Home
hogar.desc: Home care as a ritual: of natural origin cleaning transformed into the feeling of a well-kept home. Laundry detergent, fabric softener, washing-up liquid, floor cleaner, bathroom cleaner, degreaser and multi-surface cleaner — all with plant-based surfactants, up to 99% natural origin, biodegradable and ISO 16128 certified.

mascota.title: Pet
mascota.desc: Pet grooming and care rituals of natural origin: gentle care for dogs and cats with calm hygiene, peace at home and stress-free bonding. Products with MAPA registration and hypoallergenic formulas adapted to the animal microbiome.
mascota.comingSoonBody: We are preparing our of natural origin pet care line — shampoos, ear and eye cleaners for dogs and cats — for the UK market. Subscribe to our newsletter to be the first to know when it launches.
